hero.description: Tiny humans, curious teens and lifelong learners — all welcome. Pick a world, pick a language, and dive into bite-sized lessons designed to delight.

how_it_works.step1_desc: Choose from Tiny World to The Academy — or just explore freely.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Every lesson is available in 22 Indian languages.

continue.title: Continue learning
continue.description: Pick up where you left off

testimonials.quote1: My 3-year-old asks for 'the peacock game' every morning. I love that I never have to worry about ads popping up.
testimonials.quote2: I'm 14 and I actually finished a whole algebra unit on the bus. The streaks are weirdly motivating.
testimonials.quote3: Picked up Tamil at 42. Lessons are short enough to do over my morning chai. Highly recommend.

math.subtitle: A whimsical world where numbers dance, patterns hide, and every math problem is an adventure waiting to be solved! 🌟
math.footer: Made with 💜 for math wizards of all levels ✨

facts.fact2: A pizza that has radius "z" and height "a" has volume = Pi × z × z × a
facts.fact3: The word "hundred" comes from the old Norse word "hundrath" meaning 120!

daily.title: Daily Challenge
daily.description: A fresh challenge every day! Build your streak and sharpen your skills with a new problem each morning!

explorers.title: Explorers Guild

game.description: Race against the clock! Solve math puzzles as fast as you can. Build combos and reach legendary wizard status!

toddler.title: Little Explorers
toddler.welcome_desc: Let's make something amazing today! Pick an activity below.
toddler.what_to_do: What do you want to do? 🤔
toddler.no_activities: No activities found for this category!

ocean-explorers.name: Ocean Explorers
ocean-explorers.description: Dive into a week of ocean-themed adventures! Create sea creatures, explore water science, and learn about marine life.

day1.title: Paper Plate Fish
day1.description: Start your ocean adventure by creating colorful tropical fish from paper plates!

day2.title: Underwater Volcano
day2.description: Create an underwater volcanic eruption! Learn about chemical reactions while making ocean-themed lava.

day3.title: Rainstick Waves
day3.description: Build a rainstick that sounds like ocean waves! Perfect for relaxation and music.

day4.title: Beach Treasure Hunt
day4.description: Go on a beach-themed scavenger hunt! Find shells, smooth rocks, and ocean treasures.

day5.title: Ocean Diorama Showcase
day5.description: Combine everything you've learned to create an ocean diorama featuring all your sea creatures!

space-mission.name: Space Mission
space-mission.description: Blast off into a galaxy of space exploration! Build rockets, learn about planets, and discover the mysteries of the universe.

day1.title: Paper Rocket Ship
day1.description: Design and build your own rocket ship! Learn about aerodynamics and space travel.

day2.title: Balloon Rocket Race
day2.description: Launch balloon rockets across the room! Learn about thrust and Newton's third law.

day3.title: Galaxy Painting
day3.description: Create stunning galaxy art with salt painting technique! Make stars sparkle and nebulas swirl.

day4.title: Stargazing Night
day4.description: Explore the real night sky! Find constellations and learn about distant stars and planets.

day5.title: Alien Puppet Show
day5.description: Create alien sock puppets and put on a space adventure puppet show! Use your imagination to tell stories from the cosmos.

backyard-safari.name: Backyard Safari
backyard-safari.description: Embark on a wild adventure in your own backyard! Discover insects, plants, and the fascinating ecosystem right outside your door.

day1.title: Bug Hotel Construction
day1.description: Build a cozy home for beneficial insects! Learn about the bugs that help our gardens.

day2.title: Dancing Raisins Insects
day2.description: Watch "bugs" dance up and down in soda! Learn about buoyancy and gases.

day3.title: Animal Masks
day3.description: Create masks of your favorite safari animals! Transform into lions, elephants, or butterflies.

day4.title: Nature Scavenger Hunt
day4.description: Explore your backyard safari! Find insects, plants, and animal tracks.

day5.title: Safari Binoculars & Field Guide
day5.description: Create your own safari binoculars and nature field guide! Document all the creatures you discovered this week.

maker-week.name: Maker Week
maker-week.description: Put on your engineering hat! Build, experiment, and create amazing contraptions through hands-on making.

day1.title: Rubber Band Car
day1.description: Build a car powered by rubber band energy! Learn about stored energy and motion.

day2.title: Catapult Challenge
day2.description: Construct a working catapult! Learn about levers and launch pompoms across the room.

day3.title: Egg Drop Engineering
day3.description: Design a device to protect an egg from a high drop! Apply engineering principles to solve real problems.

day4.title: Marble Run
day4.description: Engineer an epic marble run with twists, turns, and drops! Experiment with gravity and momentum.

day5.title: Invention Convention
day5.description: Showcase all your inventions! Create a new robot or contraption that combines what you've learned.

no_profile_found: No profile found. Please set up a profile first.
clear_data_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete all your progress, achievements, and profile data. This action cannot be undone.
privacy_intro_text: Welcome to Jigyasu. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring a safe educational environment for children. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information across our platform. Our privacy practices are designed to align with the principles of the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP Act).
privacy_collection_text: We only collect the absolute minimum information necessary to provide our educational service:
privacy_profile_data_text: Names, avatars, and learning progress are stored locally on your device. We do not transmit this data to our servers.
privacy_analytics_text: We use privacy-first, cookieless analytics (Plausible) to understand general usage patterns. No personally identifiable information (PII) is tracked or stored.
privacy_parent_rights_text: We respect the rights of parents and guardians under child privacy laws. Parents have the right to:
privacy_right_review: Review any information we have collected from their child.
privacy_right_refuse: Refuse further collection or use of their child's information.
privacy_third_parties_text: We do not sell data to third parties, nor do we run advertisements. All third-party services we use (such as for basic site hosting and analytics) are strictly evaluated for their privacy compliance and are not permitted to use our users' data for their own purposes.
privacy_retention_text: Because learning data is stored locally on your device, it is retained until you clear your browser's local storage or explicitly delete the profile within the app. Anonymous aggregate analytics data is kept indefinitely to help us improve the platform.
privacy_contact_text: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@jigyasu.app.
terms_acceptance_text: By accessing or using Jigyasu, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
terms_acceptable_use_text: Jigyasu is an educational platform designed for children and adults. Users agree to:
terms_use_1: Use the platform solely for educational, non-commercial purposes.
terms_use_2: Not attempt to interfere with or disrupt the service or servers.
terms_use_3: Not use the platform in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations.
terms_liability_text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Jigyasu shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.
terms_termination_text: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time without notice. We may also terminate or suspend your access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
terms_governing_law_text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms_contact_text: For any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@jigyasu.app.
share_description: Celebrate your learning with family on WhatsApp!
share_note: This opens WhatsApp in a new tab. No data is collected.

about.hero_quote:
"Every child is born a scientist.
They ask why. They test everything.
Then school happens � and the why gets quieter.
We are here to keep the why loud. Forever."

step2.title: How to Play
step2.desc: Tap, drag, and interact with the elements on the screen to see what happens.

step3.title: Discover
step3.desc: Be curious and try different things. What patterns can you find?

step2.title: Gather Materials
step2.desc: First, check off the materials you have. You can always skip this step and start building!

step3.title: Follow the Steps
step3.desc: Go through each step one by one. Once you are done, mark the step as completed!
